title: Takaiko and Narihira: The Honorable Ariwara no Narihira / Yukihira and Hiroko: The Councilor Yukihira
overview: Narihira is quite the ladies’ man, but when the bride to be of emperor catches his eye, he begins to change. Yukihira, his oldest brother, was always the opposite when it came to love.

title: Sadaakira and Yasuko: Emperor Yozei
overview: Sadaakira became emperor at the age of 9 and for a time was served by Narihira, who attempted to teach him how to become a man.

title: Munesada and Yoshiko: The Monk Henjo
overview: If you visit her every night for 100 nights, she will be yours to marry. But her true dream lies at the palace.

title: Yasuhide and Narihira: Funya no Yasuhide
overview: Three poets, three different styles, each express their reason and why they write poetry.

title: Eastward: Ono no Komachi
overview: Yoshiko, Yasuhide, and Narihira have grown to be great friends. Yasuhide is being sent to Mikawa and Narihira is leaving too. The three friends spend an evening together gazing at the stars.

title: Uta Hen+
overview: G1 Grand Prix in the Heian Capital, Teika's Room, and Heian card battle. Prepare for an intense non-stop episode.

title: Yoshitaka and the Daughter of Minamoto no Yasumitsu: Fujiwara no Yoshitaka
overview: Michitaka believes Yoshitaka relationship has gone stale and tries to help. Afterwards he needs some help with lady troubles of his own.

title: Mount Suenomatsu: Kiyohara no Motosuke / Sanekata and Nagiko: The Honorable Fuji
overview: Two couples very much in love, but even time can erode at something once thought unbreakable.

title: Shonagon and Yukinari: Sei Shonagon
overview: Yukinari’s father had a natural gift for poetry, a gift not passed on. Yukinari’s anti-social nature is affecting his reputation within the palace, in particular with the ladies of the court.

title: Nakoso Falls: Shonagon Kinto
overview: With the death of a prominent figure and a shakeup within the hierarchy of the palace, many things are changing and the old poets of the palace are moving on.

title: Kaoriko and Fujiko: Lady Murasaki
overview: Two friends form a bond as children and promise to keep it, as adults they learn things change.

title: Michimasa and Masako: Minister of Left Kyoto Michimasa / Midnight Moon: The Former Emperor Sanjo
overview: A chance for love takes courage, not pride.

title: Teika and Noriko: Princess Shokushi Gon Chunagon Teika
overview: A young man, not wanting to follow in his father’s footsteps, is drawn to the world of poetry by an untouchable source.
